recommendations.title: Confidential Assignment
recommendations.overview: When a crime organization from North Korea crosses borders and enters South Korean soil, a South Korean detective must cooperate with a North Korean detective to investigate their whereabouts.

recommendations.title: The Girl in the Book
recommendations.overview: The story of a young writer's transformation when her past invades her present.

recommendations.title: The Flu
recommendations.overview: A case of the flu quickly morphs into a pandemic. As the death toll mounts and the living panic, the government plans extreme measures to contain it.

recommendations.title: Asura: The City of Madness
recommendations.overview: A shady cop finds himself in over his head when he gets caught between Internal Affairs and the city’s corrupt mayor.

recommendations.title: The Call
recommendations.overview: Connected by phone in the same home but 20 years apart, a caller puts a woman’s past — and life — on the line to change her own fate.

recommendations.title: The Warrior
recommendations.overview: In 1375, China was in chaos between Yuan Dynasty and Ming Dynasty. Coryo (an ancient kingdom of Korea then) sent a delegation of many diplomats, soldiers and a silent slave to make peace with the new Chinese government. However, this delegation got c

recommendations.title: My Name Is Loh Kiwan
recommendations.overview: After defecting from North Korea, Loh Kiwan struggles to obtain refugee status in Belgium, where he encounters a dejected woman who has lost all hope.

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.

recommendations.title: Sisters in Arms
recommendations.overview: Kenza and Yaël are two young French women who go to Syria to fight alongside the Kurdish forces. There they meet Zara, a Yezidi survivor. Born in different cultures but deeply united, the women-fighters heal their past wounds and discover their prese

recommendations.title: A Moment to Remember
recommendations.overview: A young couple's love is tested when Sun-jin is diagnosed with a rare form of Alzheimer's disease.
